news.t: Retire rich with these blue-chip dividend ETFs

holdings.infoBox: DTD is an equity ETF with a total of 821 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 3.48%, Microsoft at 3.15%, JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 2.74%, Apple at 2.16%, and Broadcom at 2.02%.

overview.description: The WisdomTree U.S. Total Dividend Fund (DTD) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the WisdomTree Dividend index. The fund tracks an index of US companies selected and weighted based on the dollar amount of dividends paid. DTD was launched on Jun 16, 2006 and is issued by WisdomTree.

data.title: Retire rich with these blue-chip dividend ETFs
data.text: Exchange-Traded Funds (ETFs) offer the best approach for investors to allocate cash and generate strong returns over time. They are often better than stocks because of their diversification.

data.title: Jeremy Siegel and WisdomTree's challenge to the traditional 60/40 portfolio model
data.text: Jeremy Schwartz, global head of research at WisdomTree, and Jeremy Siegel, professor of finance at The Wharton School and advisor to WisdomTree, discuss the firm's new portfolio strategies with CNBC's...
